description:
Import the building footprint from 'C:\workspace\data\building_footprint.dxf' into the terrain project 'C:\workspace\data\existing_terrain.tcl'. Elevate the footprint to 1850.0m and generate 1:1 cut and fill slopes to the existing terrain. Save the calculated earthwork volumes to 'C:\workspace\data\pad_earthwork.txt' formatted as:
Cut Volume: XXXX.X m3
Fill Volume: YYYY.Y m3
Export a screenshot of the grading to 'C:\workspace\data\grading_screenshot.png' and save the project to 'C:\workspace\data\graded_project.tcl'.
